prestazioni: Engine: 6.1L Hemi ESF (engine code: SRT-6.1L) with forged internals upgrade including Manley I-beam connecting rods (PN: 14095-8), JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (9.5:1 compression, PN: 361826), and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs (PN: 245-4206) for 800+ hp reliability on E85.

Forced Induction: Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm billet wheel, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate (PN: MVR44) and Turbosmart Race Port BOV (PN: TSB1000), paired with a custom 4-inch aluminum intercooler piping kit from Hellcat Racing (PN: HR-ICP-4000) and a PWR 4.5-core intercooler (PN: PWR45001).

Fuel & Ignition: Full return-style fuel system with Fore Innovations F2000 fuel pump (PN: F2000), Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (PN: ID1700X-DL58-8), and Holley Dominator ECU (PN: 554-112) running a custom SRT-6.1L flex-fuel tune by Lund Racing, with MSD 8 Plus ignition box (PN: 6201) and NGK TR7IX iridium spark plugs (PN: 5018) gapped at 0.028".
estetica: Widebody Conversion: RK Sport 'Hellcat-Style' bolt-on widebody kit (PN: RK-1000-WB) with custom 1.5" fender flares, paired with a carbon fiber hood from Anderson Composites (PN: AC-DM05-HOOD-CF) featuring a functional ram-air scoop and heat extractor vents.

Suspension & Wheels: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (PN: 35221001) with adjustable camber plates (front) and KW solid subframe collars (PN: 35221001-SFC), mounted on HRE FF01 wheels (20x10.5" ET15 front, 20x12" ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear).

Aerodynamics & Styling: Maxton Design front splitter (PN: MX-DM05-FS) with integrated canards, paired with a custom 3-piece carbon fiber rear diffuser from Seibon (PN: custom) and a Maxton Design GT-style rear wing (PN: MX-DM05-RW) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees). Full de-chrome delete with Vinyl Frog matte gunmetal wrap (PN: VFMG-24) and blacked-out SRT badges from Badgeskins (PN: BS-DODGE-SRT-BLK).
